<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get ForecastingUnit for a multiple tracer categories"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/forecastingUnit/forecastingUnit/tracerCategorys"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API used to get forecastingUnits for multiple tracer categories

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"array of tracerCategoryIds that you want to the ForecastingUnit for","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns the ForecastingUnits list","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"404":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND if the tracerCategoryIds specified does not exist","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Internal error that prevented the retreival of ForecastingUnit","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
